introSection: Revenge of the Mummy is a Premier Rides enclosed steel roller coaster located at Universal Studios Singapore in Sentosa, Singapore. The ride's theme is based on the movie series The Mummy; which is Egyptian themed. The exterior of the coaster features giant Egyptian statues.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders per train.

fullText:
Revenge of the Mummy is a Premier Rides enclosed steel roller coaster located at Universal Studios Singapore in Sentosa, Singapore. The ride's theme is based on the movie series The Mummy; which is Egyptian themed. The exterior of the coaster features giant Egyptian statues.



2 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders per train.
